case_title: LVNV FUNDING LLC VS. ANNA M BOYLAND ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $300.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 210034630) AS TO DEFENDANT BOYLAND, ANNA M
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-15-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210006007), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC SERVED APR-22-2022, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE APR-25-2022 AS TO DEFENDANT BOYLAND, ANNA M
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-16-2023 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210034630) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF WAIVER OF INTEREST AND ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 210034630) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210004202) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BOYLAND, ANNA M DOES 1 TO 5, INCLUSIVE NO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET NOT FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-03-2022
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 210004202) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
SUMMONS ISSUED (TRANSACTION ID # 210004202) TO PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION OF NON MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 210034630) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-16-2023 CONTINUED TO AUG-15-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOYLAND, ANNA M $2,751.98 PRINCIPAL, $300.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,051.98, SEE SCANNED DOC
DECLARATION CCP 1033 B (1)&(2) (TRANSACTION ID # 210034630) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT CCP 585(D) (TRANSACTION ID # 210034630) FILED BY PLAINTIFF LVNV FUNDING LLC
